features.description: Initialize Python project scaffold with pyproject, dependency groups, and CLI entrypoint
steps: When the bootstrap setup is executed
Then a runnable Python package with an `efc` CLI entrypoint exists

features.description: Configure linting, type checking, and pytest defaults for reproducible local development
steps: When quality tools are run with default configs
Then lint, type-check, and test commands execute without configuration errors

features.description: Create module layout matching the architecture for cli, core, analyzers, classifiers, reports, prompts, utils, and tests
steps: Then all architecture modules can be imported by tests

features.description: Define pydantic domain models for documents, paragraphs, sentences, diagnostics, constraints, and reports
steps: When data is parsed into domain models
Then invalid shapes are rejected and valid models serialize deterministically

features.description: Define configuration models for input YAML including constraints and preferences
steps: Given a valid user config file
Then required fields and defaults are represented in typed models

features.description: Define analyzer result and evidence-span schemas with heuristic confidence labeling
steps: Then each issue includes severity metadata and optional evidence spans with heuristic labels

features.description: Implement artifact/output path management that never overwrites original draft files
steps: When report and artifact paths are resolved
Then outputs are written to dedicated artifact locations and source files remain unchanged

features.description: Implement file ingestion for .md and .txt drafts via CLI path input
steps: Given a markdown or text file path
Then the draft content is loaded and normalized into the document model

features.description: Implement .docx ingestion using python-docx with paragraph-preserving extraction
steps: Then textual content is extracted in source order without crashing on supported formatting

features.description: Support direct pasted text and stdin workflow when no draft path is provided
steps: When analyze is invoked without a draft path
Then the pipeline analyzes stdin content as a draft

features.description: Normalize raw text while preserving semantic content and stable paragraph boundaries
steps: Given a draft with mixed whitespace and line endings
Then output text is canonicalized without changing token meaning

features.description: Segment normalized text into deterministic paragraph units with stable IDs
steps: Then paragraphs are indexed in source order with reproducible IDs

features.description: Abstract sentence segmentation behind a provider interface
steps: Then a provider-neutral API returns sentence spans and text segments

features.description: Implement default NLTK or spaCy sentence segmentation backend with deterministic fallback
steps: When the default sentence segmenter runs
Then sentence boundaries are produced consistently and fallback logic handles unavailable models

features.description: Provide token/span utility helpers for evidence extraction and paragraph-sentence mapping
steps: Then exact evidence slices and index mappings are returned

features.description: Define venue profile schema for audience, tone, structure norms, disfavored markers, and score weights
steps: Then required profile attributes and weight fields are enforced

features.description: Implement versioned venue profile loader from YAML or JSON with strict validation errors
steps: Given a valid profile file and an invalid profile file
Then valid files load and invalid files return actionable schema errors

features.description: Ship built-in v1 venue profiles for smr, boston_review, hdsr, lawfare_like, and general_policy_magazine
steps: Then the expected profile data is loaded from packaged resources

features.description: Expose profile inspection functionality for CLI profile show command
steps: Then a human-readable venue profile summary is printed

features.description: Compute baseline structure metrics including word count, section count, and paragraph count
steps: Then word, section, and paragraph counts match fixture expectations

features.description: Compute sentence length distribution metrics with variance and narrow-band cadence indicators
steps: Then average, spread, and cadence-uniformity indicators are produced

features.description: Compute paragraph length distribution metrics and identify outlier paragraphs
steps: Then outlier-long and outlier-short paragraphs are flagged

features.description: Detect em-dash usage and related forbidden punctuation markers
steps: Then em-dash counts and evidence spans are reported

features.description: Detect citation-like patterns and return counts with evidence spans
steps: Then likely citations are counted and locations are returned

features.description: Detect bullet usage and bullet-count statistics for structure constraints
steps: Then bullet counts and paragraph locations are returned

features.description: Estimate hedge density using a configurable hedge lexicon
steps: Then density score and matched hedge spans are produced

features.description: Estimate nominalization density using suffix and lexicon heuristics
steps: Then per-paragraph and document-level nominalization density is reported

features.description: Count abstraction-heavy phrase patterns with customizable phrase banks
steps: Then matched phrases and density metrics are returned

features.description: Count discourse scaffolding phrase usage and repeated scaffold dependence
steps: Then phrase counts and repetition warnings are emitted

features.description: Detect repeated sentence opener patterns across nearby sentences
steps: Then repeated pattern clusters are identified with severity

features.description: Detect repeated rhetorical templates including contrast constructions
steps: Given text with recurring rhetorical templates
Then repeated template frequency is computed and flagged

features.description: Detect undefined key terms introduced in first N paragraphs without nearby definition
steps: Then terms lacking local definitions are flagged with paragraph references

features.description: Estimate concrete actor noun density using institution and actor cues
steps: Given prose with and without institutional actors
Then actor-density scores distinguish concrete from abstract paragraphs

features.description: Measure example density and detect first-example position in the draft
steps: Given a draft containing delayed examples
Then first-example position and example density are reported

features.description: Detect acronym overload via uppercase acronym frequency and local definition checks
steps: Then overload risk and undefined acronym instances are identified

features.description: Estimate passive voice prevalence using lightweight syntax heuristics
steps: Given active and passive sentence fixtures
Then passive-prevalence estimates align with expected direction

features.description: Estimate first-paragraph throat-clearing based on pressure, stakes, and actor absence
steps: Given introductory paragraphs with delayed stakes
Then likely throat-clearing paragraphs are flagged with rationale

features.description: Compose deterministic analyzers into a single diagnostics pipeline with stable ordering
steps: Given a draft and venue profile
Then all enabled analyzers run once and return a combined report

features.description: Attach evidence spans and explicit heuristic labels to each flagged issue where possible
steps: Then each issue contains supporting span evidence or an explicit no-evidence reason

features.description: Implement rule-based paragraph role classifier for opener, framing, mechanism, example, and related roles
steps: Then each paragraph receives one supported role label with confidence metadata

features.description: Add optional LLM paragraph-role classifier interface behind feature flag without default network dependency
steps: Then rule-based classifier is used and no external call is made

features.description: Compute category-level venue-fit signals for opening fit, abstraction control, rhythm, and concreteness
steps: Given analyzer outputs and profile targets
Then normalized category scores are produced for all configured dimensions

features.description: Compute weighted overall venue-fit score from profile-defined weights with bounds 0-100
steps: Given category scores and valid weights
Then weighted result is bounded to 0-100 and reproducible

features.description: Rank severity-weighted top violations and map each to actionable issue codes
steps: Given a set of scored issues
Then top violations are ordered by severity and impact with deterministic tie-breaking

features.description: Parse and validate explicit constraint rules from config including preserve, forbid, and tolerance limits
steps: Then all supported rule types are validated and available to compliance checks

features.description: Check forbidden patterns and structure invariants including no new sections, citations, or bullets when configured
steps: Given original and revised drafts with constraints
Then forbidden additions are detected and reported as pass or fail

features.description: Verify preserved concepts remain present in revised text using exact and fuzzy matching
steps: Given required concepts and revised text
Then missing concepts are flagged with confidence and evidence

features.description: Enforce max new sentence count and word-count tolerance relative to original draft
steps: Given original and revised drafts with numeric limits
Then sentence-growth and word-range pass/fail outcomes are returned

features.description: Detect collapsed required distinctions using phrase-similarity and contrast-pattern heuristics
steps: Then suspicious merges of distinct concepts are flagged for review

features.description: Generate top global issues list with severity levels and rationale
steps: Then the top global issues list includes issue codes severity and short rationale

features.description: Generate paragraph-by-paragraph action instructions including problems and concrete edits
steps: Given paragraph diagnostics and role labels
Then each paragraph receives targeted problems and action instructions

features.description: Generate reorder opportunities, compression targets, and rhythm/concreteness interventions
steps: Then reorder, compression, rhythm, and concreteness opportunities are emitted

features.description: Generate Codex-ready rewrite brief markdown artifact with venue summary, hard constraints, and non-goals
steps: Then a markdown brief file is created under artifacts with required sections

features.description: Implement `efc analyze` command orchestrating ingestion, diagnostics, scoring, and report emission
steps: Given a valid draft and venue
Then diagnostics, scorecard, and artifacts are generated with exit code semantics

features.description: Implement `efc brief` command to emit standalone rewrite brief artifacts from analysis context
steps: Then a rewrite brief artifact is produced at the requested output path

features.description: Implement `efc verify` command for original-versus-revised compliance and preservation checks
steps: Then compliance pass/fail and preservation findings are reported

features.description: Build preservation-audit engine for key term retention, actor changes, polarity shifts, and recommendation drift
steps: Given aligned original and revised drafts
Then drift findings are emitted across configured dimensions with severities

features.description: Detect likely unsupported new claims and unresolved weak paragraphs in revised drafts
steps: Given a revised draft with inserted claims
Then suspicious new claims and weak paragraphs are surfaced for manual review

features.description: Implement rich console, JSON, and markdown report renderers for analysis and verification outputs
steps: Then console output and serialized JSON/markdown artifacts match schema expectations

features.description: Create unit, golden, regression, and performance smoke tests with deterministic fixtures and logged transformations
steps: Given the implemented pipeline and fixtures
Then required unit, golden, regression, and timing checks pass within defined thresholds
